## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 15 / Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node: [e.g. 20.18.0 — `node -v`]
- pnpm: [e.g. 11.1.2 — `pnpm -v`]
- INNOMCP commit: [e.g. `8dd78ef` — `git rev-parse HEAD`]
- MariaDB: [e.g. 11.4 — `docker ps | grep mariadb`]
- Provider used: [e.g. MDES Ollama / Claude Sonnet 4.6 / Local Ollama]

## Severity

- [ ] 🔥 Blocker — nothing works
- [ ] 🚨 High — major feature broken
- [ ] ⚠️ Medium — workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low — minor / cosmetic
